result.caveats: OpenStreetMap data is crowd sourced and cannot be considered to be exhaustive
result.name: hotosm_kor_populated_places
result.notes:
Settlements and residential areas from OSM. Includes named cities, towns, villages, suburbs, and residential land (`place=*` and `landuse=residential`). Useful for demographic context, settlement-level targeting, and population analysis.

OpenStreetMap is a free, collaborative world map built by volunteers. Completeness varies by region: urban areas are usually well-mapped, remote areas may be incomplete. Cross-check critical decisions with local field knowledge.

- Source: [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org)
- OSM tags: [Key:place](https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:place), [Key:landuse](https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:landuse)
- Part of many  [exports grid on HDX](https://data.humdata.org/organization/hot) by the [HOT](https://www.hotosm.org/en/)

organization.name: hot
organization.title: Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT)
organization.description:
**For up-to-the-minute exports from OpenStreetMap in a variety of formats for GPS and GIS, visit http://export.hotosm.org**

Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT) acts as a bridge between the traditional humanitarian responders and the OpenStreetMap Community. HOT works both remotely and physically in countries to assist the collection of geographic data, usage of that information and training others in OpenStreetMap.

result.title: South Korea : Populated Places (OpenStreetMap Export)
